title: My Son Pocketed My $85K Retirement, Diluted My Stake, And Ghosted Me. So I Waited For The Court To Give Me His Company.
description: I handed my son $85K from my 403(b) to launch his fitness app, and he responded by diluting my equity to zero and blocking my calls. I backed up the source code, registered a competing domain, and when he sued me, I countersued for fraud. The court awarded me full ownership, and now Grandma’s Gains is worth $1.2 million while he works my service desk for minimum wage. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: I TURNED HIS BETRAYAL INTO A $1.2M EMPIRE
pinned_comment: If your own child emptied your retirement fund and then diluted your stake to zero, would you have trusted a countersuit to hand you the company? Share your experience in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: SHE BACKS UP CODE, BUYS RIVAL DOMAIN, AND WAITS FOR LAWSUIT
